name: acronym
primaryUseCase: Generates an acronym from a given name by extracting the first letter of each word.

name: applyThemeSchema
primaryUseCase: Utility function for applyThemeSchema

name: classNames
primaryUseCase: A utility function that combines classnames library with tailwind-merge to intelligently merge Tailwind CSS classes, resolving conflicts.

name: dateRange
primaryUseCase: Utility function for dateRange

name: fileSizeUnit
primaryUseCase: Converts byte values to human-readable file size strings with appropriate units (KB, MB, GB, etc.).

name: formatCurrency
primaryUseCase: Formats numbers as currency strings using Intl.NumberFormat with locale and currency support.

name: formatCurrencyCompact
primaryUseCase: Formats large currency values with K, M, B, T suffixes for compact display while maintaining currency context.

name: formatDate
primaryUseCase: A collection of date formatting utilities using dayjs for consistent date display across the application.

name: formatNumber
primaryUseCase: Formats large numbers with K, M, B, T suffixes for compact display while maintaining readability.

name: formatRelativeTime
primaryUseCase: Formats dates as human-readable relative time strings (e.g., '2 hours ago', 'in 3 days') using Intl.RelativeTimeFormat.

name: getContrast
primaryUseCase: Determines whether a color is light or dark using W3C perceived brightness formula, useful for choosing contrasting text colors.

name: highlightSearchMatch
primaryUseCase: Highlights search term matches within text by wrapping them in styled mark elements.

name: isBrowser
primaryUseCase: Utility function for isBrowser

name: isLastChild
primaryUseCase: Simple utility to check if an array index represents the last element.

name: paginate
primaryUseCase: Slices an array into pages for client-side pagination.

name: queryRoute
primaryUseCase: Utility function for queryRoute

name: sleep
primaryUseCase: A promise-based delay utility for creating pauses in async functions.

name: sortBy
primaryUseCase: Creates a comparison function for sorting arrays of objects by a specific field with optional value transformation.

name: wildCardSearch
primaryUseCase: Performs case-insensitive wildcard search across object properties, useful for filtering lists and tables.

name: useAppendQueryParams
primaryUseCase: A hook for programmatically appending or updating URL query parameters with support for replace/push navigation and override modes.

name: useAuthority
primaryUseCase: A hook for checking if user has required authority/permissions by comparing user roles against required roles.

name: useCurrentSession
primaryUseCase: Hook for useCurrentSession

name: useDebounce
primaryUseCase: A hook that creates a debounced version of a function using lodash debounce, useful for optimizing expensive operations.

name: useInterval
primaryUseCase: A hook for running a callback function at regular intervals with automatic cleanup and pause support.

name: useLayout
primaryUseCase: Accessing layout configuration in template components

name: useMenuActive
primaryUseCase: Determining active menu items from navigation tree

name: useNavigation
primaryUseCase: Hook for useNavigation

name: useRandomColor
primaryUseCase: A hook that generates consistent random colors from a predefined palette based on string input, useful for avatars and tags.

name: useResponsive
primaryUseCase: A hook for detecting current viewport size and comparing against Tailwind CSS breakpoints for responsive behavior.

name: useScrollTop
primaryUseCase: A hook that tracks whether the page has been scrolled from the top, useful for sticky headers and scroll-based UI changes.

name: useTheme
primaryUseCase: Hook for useTheme

name: useTimeOutMessage
primaryUseCase: A hook for managing temporary messages that automatically clear after a specified interval, useful for success/error notifications.

name: useTranslation
primaryUseCase: A wrapper hook around react-i18next for internationalization with optional placeholder mode for development.
